title: Create: Direct Chute
description: Adds a new chute that transfers items directly from one container to another, without storing any item inside. Optimizes storage and performance
body:
Create: Direct chutes adds a, guess what, new chute! This chute behaves a little different than normal chutes. It doesn't have any slot inside, but rather directly sends items from the container above to the one below. Direct chutes can be stacked on top, and will provide instant item transfer over long distances.

Imagine this scenario: Your chute has an emerald stuck inside of it and so it cannot transfer diamonds down in your chest, even though you only have 1 diamond inside your chest so it could still transfer 63 more... this can be solved with a direct chute!
![Differences between normal chute and direct chute](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LIUKRAST/CreateDirectChute/refs/heads/master/showcase_direct_chute.png)

## V1.1.0
Direct chutes are now made out of zinc instead of copper to bring consistency (copper is fluid related in create context). They also now allow diagonal connections and can be encased with a zinc block
